parameters: \n<Naruto> \c[10] It seems that Tsunade is here...\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] But she's just sitting on the floor,
she doesn't even need my help.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] I wonder if there is something
I can do to make Tsunade accept my help?\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Maybe I can bait the washer with something
to get her stuck halfway inside...\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] but what could possibly get her
attention enough to do such a thing?\
*Come back on Thursday morning to advance and
ensure you have SEXJUTSU level 1 and 50 ryo*
\n<Naruto> \c[10] I will be back a little later.\
Tsunade is here, talk to her?
\n<Naruto> \c[10] (DAMN, I WANT TO JUMP ON HER...)\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] (Stay calm Naruto... play your cards well.)\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] Naruto? ah... I... what are you doing here?\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] Ah... No Naruto... Im okay, just leave me alo-\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] I'll help you to unstuck Tsunadebachan, dattebayo!\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] I learned a lot at the academy about this, leave it to me.\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] WHAT DO YOU THINK YOU ARE DOING?\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] I DIDN'T ASK FOR YOUR HELP,
DO NOT TRY TO TAKE ADVANTAGE OF THE SITUATION.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] O-Obachan i'm sorry!, I swear I didn't mean to\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] (Damn this big-titted bitch hits really hard)\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] (I think I will have to change my tactics
...perhaps I can use glue next time?)\
Put the pouch (50 Ryo) and the glue?
You put the money and the glue...
\n<Naruto> \c[10] I will be back a little later.\
Tsunade is here, talk to her?
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] Not a good time... what do you want?\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] I was passing by and saw that you were in the washing machine...
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Well, you've been here for a while...
I thought you might need some help this time.\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] Well... I... apparently I got stuck on something,
and if I use too much force, I could break the washing machine.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] You got stuck? that's unfortunate, but well...
you know I might be able to help you, right?\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] And how are you supposed to help me?
I told you that if I try to force my way out, the machine could break...
and we don't have the money to buy a new one,
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Well, you don't need to move hard...
you see, the glue can be undone if you wiggle slowly\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] The glue? What do you mean by glue?\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] How do you know it's glue? N-NARUTO\..\..\..
DIDN'T YOU HAVE SOMETHING TO DO WITH THIS?\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] AH-H No no!, it's just that I learned about
these things at the academy and you know...
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] What do you think you are about to do?\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Trust me obachan, just wiggle to the side
and the glue will undo itself, that's better than
\n<Tsunade> \c[14]  I'm stuck in this piece of junk
\n<Tsunade> \c[14]..and my clothes slip at the slightest movement—\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] But Obachan, I can hardly move,
you have to get off me\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] WHAT DO YOU THINK I'M TRYING TO DO, IDIOT?\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14]I got stuck again thanks to you!\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14]Naruto... If you don't make this thing
disappear, I'm going to rip it off!\
you put your huge tits on me!\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Why don't you just stay still so I can pick
up the screws and we can finish this?\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14]I TOLD YOU TO PUT YOUR THING AWAY RIGHT NOW!\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] B-but it's impossible if you rub
\n<Naruto> \c[10] How do you expect it not to get
\n<Naruto> \c[10] (God, I can't believe this is happening.)\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] (She's going to kill me as soon as
I get out of here \..\..BUT IT FEELS SO GOOD!)\
TITJOB PRESS RIGHT "H" TO HIDE TEXT \..\..\..\!
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] W-why is it getting even bigger!?\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] I didn't mean to, I told you, you got on
top of me and... well... you know.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] By the way, your hair looks
\n<Naruto> \c[10] \..\..Ha.. don't worry! I'm going to Ichiraku,
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] FUCKING INSECT, DON'T PLAY DUMB WITH ME\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] YOU THINK YOU CAN TAKE ADVANTAGE
OF THE SITUATION AND WALK AWAY LIKE NOTHING HAPPENED?\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] THE NEXT TIME I SEE YOUR DICK NEAR ME,
I'M TEARING IT INTO 34 PIECES, IDIOT!\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] Naruto... you better hope this works.\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] And WHY THE HELL are you so close to me?\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] I need to guide your movement from close...\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] You don't want to break the washing machine
by trying to move and not measuring your strength... right?\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] What do you mean, I'm the hokage,
you think I don't control my strength?\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Well, but you're not an expert at getting unstuck like me.\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] What is this stupid thing about knowing how to unstuck?\
just so you can rub it in with me.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] AH-H no Obachan is not like that...\
I can get out on my own!\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Wait, you can't, trust me, I'll help you out.\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] Naruto... I'm running out of patience.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] You're almost out Tsunade, just a few more seconds...\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] DON'T YOU UNDERSTAND WHEN I TELL YOU TO BACK OFF?\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] I KNOW YOU WELL TO KNOW THAT IT'S JUST
\n<Naruto> \c[10] (She ended up breaking the washing machine after all.)\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] (I hope I don't have to pay for this at least....)\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] Look what you made me do! My precious washing machine is broken! 😭
\n<Tsunade> \c[14]\...\...You will buy me a new one! 😠
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] Not another word or you will sleep outside.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10](Man, I feel pretty bad for causing Tsunade to destroy her machine. She looks so worried about it, especially since she's broke AF.)
\n<Naruto> \c[10](\...\...I know, I can repair it myself with the toolbox!)
\n<Naruto> \c[10](\...\...I don't know whether she will even let me near it again though - without building up some trust first.)
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Hey Obachan, what are you doing?\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Huh, well... I wanted to see if you
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] Well, yes, of course I need something.\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] I need you to pay me for fixing my broken
\n<Naruto> \c[10] W-What? But it was you who...\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Maybe I can fix it for you.\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] You think you can do that?\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Well, with the right tools, I can try.\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] It's the least you can do.\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] I'll be upstairs if you need me.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Okay, obachan, leave it to me.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] She blames me, but she was
the one who broke her own washing machine.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Anyway, let's see what I can do.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Well... I might need a little more time.\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] Can't you go a little faster?\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] You have other things to take
care of, you can't be here all day.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] You should be grateful to me for
agreeing to fix this washing machine.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] In fact, maybe you should be the
one to fix your own washing machine.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] All you do is complain while
\n<Naruto> \c[10] If you need money so badly,
why don't you sell photos of those huge tits?\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] Who do you think you are to talking to?\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] What kind of woman do you take me for?\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] Now stop slacking off and finish that work,
\n<Naruto> \c[10] (I-I think I shouldn't have said that to her)\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] I don't know if this junk will work again.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] But if I don't do something,
this chick is going to make me sick—\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] (It was obvious I shouldn't get distracted...)\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] I need a hand here, please.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] I dropped the screws and the screwdriver.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] I need you to hold it for me so it
doesn't move around and I don't lose them in the clothes
\n<Naruto> \c[10] W-What? No, no, I've almost got it...\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] Na-Naruto... by any chance you're not...?\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14]  Don't tell me that what I'm feeling is your...?\
Tsunade is going to kill me)\
\n<Tsunade> \c[14] D-damn... don't tell me I can't get out...\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] I need a toolbox... Ino has one in her flower shop, I think\
